home.title: Welcome to EJJAR Tour
home.description: EJJAR connects contractors with verified suppliers across Oman. Let me show you the complete flow. We will simulate a contractor looking for excavators in Muscat.

select_category.title: Step 1: Choose Category
select_category.description: Three categories available: Manpower (workers), Machinery & Vehicles (equipment), and Shipping (cargo). For this demo we will choose Machinery.

select_location.title: Step 2: Select Location
select_location.description: The contractor selects their project location. EJJAR matches RFQs to suppliers in the same city. We will use Oman → Muscat.

tap_search.title: Step 3: Find Suppliers
tap_search.description: Tap Search to find verified suppliers matching the criteria. EJJAR shows all available, verified suppliers in the region.

search_results.title: Step 4: Verified Suppliers
search_results.description: EJJAR shows verified suppliers with ratings, response time, fleet size, and availability. Notice the Platinum tier badges for top-rated suppliers.

tap_submit_rfq.title: Step 5: Broadcast RFQ
tap_submit_rfq.description: Instead of contacting suppliers one by one, the contractor broadcasts ONE RFQ to ALL matching suppliers at once. This is EJJAR's key innovation.

login_phone.title: Step 6: Secure Login
login_phone.description: EJJAR uses phone OTP authentication. No passwords needed. The contractor enters their Oman mobile number to receive a verification code.

login_otp.title: Step 7: Verify Identity
login_otp.description: 6-digit OTP sent via SMS. Once verified, contractor identity is established and they can submit RFQs.

rfq_form.title: Step 8: Fill RFQ Details
rfq_form.description: Contractor enters project requirements: dates, quantity, specifications, attachments, and digital signature. All bilingual EN/AR.

rfq_submitted.title: Step 9: Broadcast Complete
rfq_submitted.description: RFQ is broadcast to all matching suppliers simultaneously. Each supplier receives an instant notification in their portal.

rfq_new.title: Step 10: Waiting Stage
rfq_new.description: RFQ status: NEW. The system is now waiting for suppliers to respond with their quotes. Notice the status stepper at the top showing progress.

rfq_quotes_received.title: Step 11: Quotes Received
rfq_quotes_received.description: Two suppliers responded with competitive quotes. Contractor can compare quote amount, allocated resources, and supplier ratings.

rfq_accept_quote.title: Step 12: Accept Best Quote
rfq_accept_quote.description: Contractor accepts the best offer. Other suppliers are notified that they were not selected. EJJAR maintains transparency throughout.

rfq_confirmed.title: Step 13: Job Confirmed
rfq_confirmed.description: Once both parties confirm, contact details are unmasked. The contractor now sees the supplier's real name and phone number. Job creation begins.

job_tracking.title: Step 14: Track Your Job
job_tracking.description: The job appears in your Jobs tab with live milestone tracking. Monitor progress, completion percentage, and supplier contact details — all in one place.

job_completed.title: Step 15: Mark Complete
job_completed.description: Once the work is done, tap 'Mark as Complete'. Both parties confirm, the job closes, and you can now leave a review for the supplier.

review_screen.title: Step 16: Leave Review
review_screen.description: Contractor rates the supplier 1–5 stars with comments and photos. Reviews are public and help future contractors choose reliable suppliers.

review_submitted.title: Tour Complete!
review_submitted.description: That's the complete EJJAR flow: Search → Broadcast → Compare → Accept → Track → Complete → Review. All in one platform, fully bilingual, across Oman.
